summary: Modern, futuristic portfolio website for Subodh Ram (MCA student, Mumbai) with command-line terminal aesthetic inspired by networking/CMD, dark theme with neon blue/purple highlights, animated network backgrounds, and sections for education, projects, internships, certifications, skills, achievements, and contact info
architectural_notes: Single-page portfolio website with smooth scrolling sections
Dark theme with neon blue/purple color scheme for futuristic aesthetic
Animated background with network lines and smart city visuals
Component-based structure: Hero, Personal Info, Education, Projects, Internships, Certifications, Skills, Achievements, Contact
CSS animations for hover effects, scroll-triggered animations, and parallax
Responsive layout using CSS Grid/Flexbox for mobile and desktop
Professional typography and spacing optimized for recruiter viewing
Command-line/terminal aesthetic with CMD-style interface for networking theme
Monospace fonts and terminal-style prompts for professional developer feel

existing_features.title: Create a Hero section displaying 'SUBODH RAM' as the name, 'Master of Computer Applications Student (2024–2026)' as the title, and 'Networking & IT Infrastructure Enthusiast' as the tagline, with subtle animated network lines and data flow elements in the background
Create a Personal Info section displaying Date of Birth: 28/04/2003

Create an Education section displaying four educational institutions with their details: MPSTME, NMIMS University – MCA (2024–2026), CGPA: 7.38/10; Tolani College of Commerce – BSc IT (2020–2023), CGPA: 8.28/10; Chandrabhan Sharma College – HSC: 74.77% (2018–2020); S.A Public School – SSC: 66.20% (2018)

Create a Projects section with three project cards including hover effects: 1) Smart Parking System (2025) with Java, Spring Boot, JSP, Oracle DB, Firebase tech stack, featuring real-time parking discovery, pricing, booking, OpenStreetMap integration, and QR-based secure access; 2) Property Price Prediction System (2025) with React, Node.js, Python, MongoDB tech stack, featuring AI-based property price prediction and interactive dashboards; 3) SmartTech Connect (2025) with React, Node.js, MongoDB, Firebase tech stack, featuring technician booking, chat, community, and AI recommendations

Create an Internships & Experience section with two detailed work experiences: 1) Aivariant – Data Analysis Intern (Nov 2023 – May 2024) with responsibilities including data cleaning/preprocessing, statistical analysis using Excel and Python, and dashboard creation/visualization; 2) Sunjewels Pvt Ltd – IT Support Assistant (Dec 2023 – July 2024) with responsibilities including user account management, access roles, password policies, network security monitoring, blocking unauthorized access, IP addressing, subnetting, routing, DHCP/DNS/NAT/gateway configuration, network troubleshooting using Wireshark/ping/traceroute/Nmap, and end-user/system support
Create a Certifications section displaying Data Analytics Certification from ExcelR (Aug 2023 – Jan 2024)

Create a Skills section with icons or progress bars displaying Technical Skills (Programming: Java, Python, JavaScript; Databases: MongoDB, MySQL, Firebase; Data Tools: Power BI, Tableau, Excel, Data Visualization; Networking: TCP/IP, Subnetting, Routing & Switching, DHCP, DNS, NAT, Firewall Configuration; Tools: Nmap, Wireshark; IT: System Security, User Access Management) and Soft Skills (Problem-Solving, Team Collaboration, Effective Communication, Time Management)
Create an Achievements section highlighting 'Led end-to-end data analysis projects converting raw data into meaningful insights'
Create a Contact section with placeholders for Phone, Email, LinkedIn, and GitHub
Implement a dark theme with neon blue and purple highlights throughout the entire portfolio website
Add a futuristic smart city background with glowing network connections visible throughout the portfolio
Implement smooth scroll animations and parallax effects throughout the portfolio for enhanced user experience
Add animated network lines that visually connect different sections of the portfolio
Ensure the portfolio is fully responsive and optimized for both mobile and desktop viewing
Add a Download Resume button that allows users to download Subodh Ram's resume
Apply professional typography and consistent spacing throughout the portfolio to ensure recruiter-friendly readability and clean minimal UI
Generate a futuristic smart city background image with glowing network connections in neon blue and purple tones (smart-city-bg.dim_1920x1080.png)
Render all generated images as static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated and reference them in the portfolio UI

Transform the entire portfolio UI to mimic a command-line terminal interface with monospace fonts (Courier New, Consolas, or Monaco), dark terminal background (black or dark gray), green terminal text as primary color, and blinking cursor animations

Replace section headings with CMD-style command prompts (e.g., 'C:\Users\SubodhRam> dir Education', 'C:\Users\SubodhRam> ipconfig /all' for networking sections, 'C:\Users\SubodhRam> tasklist' for projects)
Display section content with CMD output formatting including ASCII borders, pipe characters for tables, and terminal-style lists with bullet points replaced by command output symbols (>, -, *)
Add terminal-style typing animations for the Hero section where the name, title, and tagline appear character-by-character as if being typed in a CMD window
Replace the Download Resume button with a CMD-style button displaying 'C:\> download resume.pdf' with terminal green text on dark background and hover effect that adds a blinking cursor

Update the color scheme to use classic terminal colors: black/dark gray background, bright green (#00FF00) for primary text, white for secondary text, and yellow for highlights or warnings, removing the existing neon blue and purple theme
Add scanline overlay effect across the entire viewport to simulate CRT monitor appearance and enhance the retro terminal aesthetic
Replace the network lines animation with ASCII art network diagrams or flowing text characters (like Matrix-style falling characters) that represent network packets and data flow
Format Skills section to display as CMD command output with commands like 'netstat -ano' for networking skills, 'python --version' for programming languages, and 'systeminfo' for IT tools
